Class BaseBlack

java.lang.Object
xyz.yaszu.freedom.Soul.Base.BaseBlack
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener, Base_Soul
public class BaseBlack extends Object implements Base_Soul, org.bukkit.event.Listener
Black Moveset

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    BaseBlack.BlackInformation
    The BlackInformation class is used to store and manage information about specific player-related items and locations within the game.
    class 
    BaseBlack.InventoryGui
    Represents a graphical user interface (GUI) for inventory customization or management.

    Methods inherited from interface Base_Soul

    AbilityOneLite, AbilityTwoLite, alive, can_ability, canUseLiteOne, canUseLiteTwo, effective_cooldown, getImbuePlayer, getOwnersImbuedItemInHand, ImbueActive, isImbuedBy, isValidLiteLink

  • Field Details

    • random

      public static Random random
      A shared Random instance used to generate random numbers throughout the application. This is a static variable,

    • originalProfiles

      public static HashMap<UUID, me.libraryaddict.disguise.disguisetypes.PlayerDisguise> originalProfiles
      A mapping that associates unique player identifiers (UUIDs) with their respective PlayerDisguise instances. This map is used to store and manage the original disguise profiles of players.

    • inventoryGui

      public HashMap<org.bukkit.entity.Player, BaseBlack.InventoryGui> inventoryGui
      A mapping of players to their respective InventoryGui instances. This field is used to store and manage GUI inventories tied to individual players. The key in the map represents a player, while the value is an InventoryGui object which holds the custom inventory associated with that player.

    • AbilityOne

      public void AbilityOne(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, boolean is_imbue)
      Ability One - An ability that can be triggered using an ITEM and/or with Inputs
      Specified by:
      AbilityOne in interface Base_Soul
      Parameters:
      player - Player to handle Ability One for
      is_imbue - If the ability is imbued, it will not be triggered by a player input. Constructs a Menu, that has 9 slots to allow for saving and deleting saved locations, and teleporting to said locations

    • AbilityTwo

      public void AbilityTwo(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack ability_item) throws net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException, net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException
      Ability Two - An ability that can be triggered using an ITEM and/or with Inputs
      Specified by:
      AbilityTwo in interface Base_Soul
      Parameters:
      player - Player to handle Ability Two for
      ability_item - ItemStack used in ability usage
      Throws:
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException - if there's an error with MineSkin
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException - if there's an error with data request

    • AbilityTwo

      public void AbilityTwo(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack ability_item, boolean is_imbue) throws net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException, net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException
      Ability Two - An ability that can be triggered using an ITEM and/or with Inputs
      Specified by:
      AbilityTwo in interface Base_Soul
      Parameters:
      player - Player to handle Ability Two for
      ability_item - ItemStack used in ability usage
      is_imbue - checking if it's imbued
      Throws:
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException - if there's an error with MineSkin
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException - if there's an error with data request Disguise as any player online on the server

    • InventoryClickEvent

      public void InventoryClickEvent(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryClickEvent event) throws net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException, net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException
      Event Handler for Inventory Click Event Allows for Disguise and Undisguise
      Parameters:
      event - InventoryClickEvent
      Throws:
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException - if there's an error with MineSkin
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException - if there's an error with data request

    • join

      public static void join(org.bukkit.entity.Player player) throws net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException, net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException
      Handles the process of allowing a player to join with specific configurations and attributes based on their persistent data and soul type.
      Parameters:
      player - The player who is attempting to join.
      Throws:
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException - If an error occurs while processing the player's skin data.
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException - If an error occurs while requesting or handling data.

    • Respawnevent

      public void Respawnevent(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerRespawnEvent event)
      Handles the PlayerRespawnEvent by applying certain effects to the player based on their SoulType, which is retrieved from their PersistentDataContainer. If the player's SoulType is `None`, they are given Strength, Speed, and Health Boost potion effects with infinite duration.
      Parameters:
      event - The PlayerRespawnEvent triggered when a player respawns.

    • onPlayerJoin

      public void onPlayerJoin(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerJoinEvent event) throws net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException, net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException
      Event handler for the PlayerJoinEvent that processes the player's data, sets their skin, and updates their attributes or other configurations based on their persistent data and soul type. It also ensures inventory GUI synchronization for relevant players.
      Parameters:
      event - The PlayerJoinEvent triggered when a player joins the server.
      Throws:
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.MineSkinException - If there is an error while processing the player's skin data.
      net.skinsrestorer.api.exception.DataRequestException - If there is an error while requesting or handling data.

    • onPlayerLeave

      public void onPlayerLeave(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerQuitEvent event)
      Handles the PlayerQuitEvent when a player leaves the server. This method ensures that the player's inventory GUI is properly removed from the internal tracking map to avoid memory leaks or inconsistent data.
      Parameters:
      event - The PlayerQuitEvent triggered when a player quits the server.

    • playerSneakEvent

      public void playerSneakEvent(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Handles the sneaking behavior of a player by deducting Soul Points and applying specific effects based on the player's SoulType. If the player's SoulType is `Black` or `BaseBlack`, the player gains temporary invisibility while sneaking.
      Specified by:
      playerSneakEvent in interface Base_Soul
      Parameters:
      player - The player who triggered the sneaking event.

      Passive_Description in interface Base_Soul

    • ActivePassive

      public void ActivePassive(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Active Passive - A passive that requires a condition to activate (like sneaking or specific stats)
      Specified by:
      ActivePassive in interface Base_Soul
      Parameters:
      player - Player to handle active passive for

    • onPlayerClickInventory

      public void onPlayerClickInventory(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryClickEvent event)
      Handles the event when a player interacts with a custom inventory menu. This method is responsible for controlling actions such as deleting saved locations, saving the player's current location into a slot, or teleporting the player to a saved location, depending on the slot and item clicked within the inventory. The interaction logic ensures that changes are persisted and the inventory appearance is updated dynamically to reflect actions taken.
      Parameters:
      event - The InventoryClickEvent triggered when a player interacts with an inventory. It provides information about the click, the inventory, and the player involved.

    • onBlackInformationClose

      public void onBlackInformationClose(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryCloseEvent event)
      Handles the inventory close event for the BlackInformation menu. Ensures that player-specific BlackInformation data is saved to the player's PersistentDataContainer when the inventory is closed.
      Parameters:
      event - the InventoryCloseEvent triggered when a player closes an inventory.
